Columns.Name: 工事_見積手配待ち件数
工事_見積手配保留件数
工事_設計審査完了件数
工事_受注確定待ち件数
工事_審査修正依頼中件数
工事_報告書納品待ち件数

ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (subb.estimate_arrange_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事_見積手配待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (subb.estimate_arrange_pending_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事_見積手配保留件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (subb.design_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事_設計待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (subb.design_examination_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事_設計審査中件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (subb.examination_complete_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事_設計審査完了件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (subb.order_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事_受注確定待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (suba.construction_check_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事_工事確認中件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (suba.construction_check_schedule_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事_日程確認中件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (suba.construction_report_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事_報告待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (suba.construction_examination_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事_施工審査中件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (suba.requesting_correction_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事_審査修正依頼中件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (suba.report_delivery_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事_報告書納品待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (suba.construction_complete_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "工事_完了待ち件数"
   FROM ((t_object_construction main
     JOIN m_construction_status suba ON ((main.construction_status_id = suba.construction_status_id)))
     LEFT JOIN m_construction_estimate_status subb ON ((suba.construction_estimate_status_id = subb.construction_estimate_status_id)))
  WHERE ((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM t_object_order
          WHERE ((t_object_order.object_order_id = main.object_order_id) AND (t_object_order.active_flg = 1)))) AND ((subb.estimate_arrange_wait_flg = 1) OR (subb.estimate_arrange_pending_flg = 1) OR (subb.design_wait_flg = 1) OR (subb.design_examination_flg = 1) OR (subb.examination_complete_flg = 1) OR (subb.order_wait_flg = 1) OR (suba.construction_check_flg = 1) OR (suba.construction_check_schedule_flg = 1) OR (suba.construction_report_wait_flg = 1) OR (suba.construction_examination_flg = 1) OR (suba.requesting_correction_flg = 1) OR (suba.report_delivery_wait_flg = 1) OR (suba.construction_complete_wait_flg = 1)));
